hooks.command: node -e "let d=process.cwd(),p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),u=require('url');while(!f.existsSync(p.join(d,'.specify','bin','specify-hook.mjs'))){let n=p.dirname(d);if(n===d){console.error('Missing .specify/bin/specify-hook.mjs. Run specify integration repair.');process.exit(2)}d=n}import(u.pathToFileURL(p.join(d,'.specify','bin','specify-hook.mjs')).href)" specify-hook claude session-start
